H_log_le_primeCountingReal_add_one (n : ‚Ąē) (x : ‚ĄĚ) (hxge : x ‚Č• n) (hxlt : x < n + 1) :
      Real.log x ‚Č§ primeCountingReal x + 1 :=
    calc
      Real.log x ‚Č§ ‚ąĎ k ‚ąą Icc 1 n, (k : ‚ĄĚ)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ := by sorry
      _ ‚Č§ (‚ąĎ' m : (S‚āĀ x), (m : ‚ĄĚ)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ) := by sorry
      _ ‚Č§ (‚ąŹ p ‚ąą primesBelow ‚Ćäx‚Ćč.natAbs, (‚ąĎ' k : ‚Ąē, (p ^ k : ‚ĄĚ)‚ĀĽ¬Ļ)) := by sorry
      _ ‚Č§ (‚ąŹ k ‚ąą Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (nth Nat.Prime k) / ((nth Nat.Prime k) - 1)) := by sorry
